input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.5.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.5.1.2
            TITLE: no adjustments will be made to times for running in differing operating conditions.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.5.1.2: No adjustments will be made to times for running in differing Operating Conditions.
D.5.1.2 No adjustments will be made to times for running in differing Operating Conditions.

final_answer: No adjustments will be made to times for running in differing Operating Conditions.
